hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "\bnpm (install|run|exec|init|ci|test|start|build|publish|uninstall|update|audit|fund|cache|pack|link|prune|dedupe|shrinkwrap)\b|\bnpm i\b|\byarn (install|add|remove|run|build|test|start)\b|\byarn\b"; then echo "BLOCKED: Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn. This project uses pnpm exclusively."; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "Co-Authored-By|co-authored-by|Authored-by|--author|git config.*(user\.name|user\.email)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not add co-authors or change git author. All commits must be from Sandhya Sharma only."; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git push --force|git push -f|git reset --hard|git clean -fd|git checkout \."; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git operation detected. Ask the user for confirmation first."; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|rm -rf \.\.?\/"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous rm -rf detected. Verify the path before proceeding."; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\.local$|\.env\.production$|credentials|secret|private.*key"; then echo "BLOCKED: Attempting to write to a sensitive file ($FILE). Ask the user for confirmation."; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.env$|\.env\.local$|\.env\.production$|credentials|secret|private.*key"; then echo "BLOCKED: Attempting to edit a sensitive file ($FILE). Ask the user for confirmation."; exit 1; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "pnpm (install|add|remove|update)"; then echo "NOTE: Dependencies changed. Run prisma generate if schema-related packages were updated."; fi'
